title: First Time Experience | StretchLab
meta_description: StretchLab offers beginners and people of all fitness levels customized assisted stretches and a mobility scan in a comfortable group setting.
h1:
NEW TO STRETCHLAB?
 
WE GOT YOUR BACK.
LITERALLY.
body_markdown:
# 
NEW TO STRETCHLAB?
WE GOT YOUR BACK.
LITERALLY.
THE FIRST TIME EXPERIENCE
##  HOW STRETCHLAB WORKS 
![Copy_of_StretchLab-0431-1](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Copy_of_StretchLab-0431-1.jpg?width=1200&height=800&name=Copy_of_StretchLab-0431-1.jpg)
###  ONE-ON-ONE STRETCH 
If you haven’t had an assisted stretch before – prepare yourself to feel fantastic! Your Flexologist will greet you and discuss your current flexibility and mobility levels, injuries that you may have dealt with, and walk you through what you'll experience during your session.  
  
Stretches are performed on one of our custom designed benches. Your stretch should never be painful, but your Flexologist will communicate with you throughout your stretch to gauge your comfort level. It’s best to wear clothes you feel comfortable moving in. Activewear is best so that you have full mobility.  
  
We require grip socks for your safety and hygiene. If you don't have any, your studio offers a great selection for you to purchase a pair!
[ Book A Bench ](https://lp.stretchlab.com/try?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
##  FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS 
[ What do you do at StretchLab? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
StretchLab provides one-on-one, customized assisted stretching sessions. The stretches are given on our custom designed benches by Flexologists who will customize your stretch to your needs and talk you through your stretches. Our Flexologists employ a “push & release” type of stretching (technically “proprioceptive neuromuscular facilitation stretching”, or PNF) where you will be resisting a bit at times during the stretch and then releasing, resulting in a more effective stretch.
[ When should I get stretched? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
This varies, but it is really up to you and your Flexologist. Based on your assessment, your Flexologist will work with you and recommend a stretch plan for you.
[ How often should I get stretched? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
Just like any activity, consistency is key. We offer memberships to get stretched once or twice a week. Your Flexologist will talk to you about the best option for your needs.
[ What sort of backgrounds do your Flexologists have? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
Our Flexologists have a variety of backgrounds and are all certified and/or licensed in various bodyworking fields. We have massage therapists, yoga instructors, personal trainers, chiropractors, assistant physical therapists and more! They all complete an extensive training program that teaches them proper stretching techniques and how to work with clients of all body sizes and flexibility levels.
[ I'm afraid of getting hurt. ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
Don’t be. You will feel tension during your stretch, but not pain. Your Flexologist will be constantly checking in with you on your comfort level and will adjust the stretch to your comfort. As the stretches are given your Flexologist will ask you where you are on an intensity scale (your own scale) of 1-10. We shoot for about a 7 on most stretches; if it approaches being too intense, just tell the Flexologist that you are closing in on or at your limit. Some people like a more vigorous stretch, others less so; the stretch is in your control.
[ What if I have an injury? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
We prefer to not stretch anyone who is suffering from any sort of acute injury. You should definitely see a doctor or physical therapist and get clearance from them PRIOR to coming to StretchLab. We are NOT physical therapists. If, however, you suffer from chronic pain, discomfort or tightness, getting an assisted stretch is okay—as long as your doctor or physical therapist approves.
[ Do you have to make an appointment? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
We take walk-ins and appointments. We recommend appointments, however, to guarantee a spot and the Flexologist of your choice.
[ What do I wear? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
You can wear whatever you will feel comfortable getting stretched in. People wear workout clothes, gym shorts, yoga gear, loose fitting shorts, T-shirts.
[ Can I get a private room? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
We do not offer services in private rooms. But you can certainly request a bench toward the back if you prefer.
[ How old do you have to be? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
There is no strict age limit. We welcome clients of all ages! However, a parent or guardian will have to sign our waiver for anyone under 18.
[ What is a premium studio? ](https://www.stretchlab.com/first-timers)
Premium studios are excluded from All Access for recurring memberships:  
Chelsea, Austin Street, Bayside, Cobble Hill, Columbus Circle, Midtown East, Tribeca, Union Square NYC, Upper East Side, West 75th Street, West 96th Street.
WHAT OUR MEMBERS ARE  
SAYING
![FirstTimers-JeffreyP](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-JeffreyP.jpg)
Jeffrey P 
I just finished my first stretch at StretchLab and I couldn’t be happier. Clean , friendly, and knowledgeable staff. If you want to try something new this should be it. You can really feel a difference from walking in to walking out. Thank you. 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-JessicaB](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-JessicaB.jpg)
Jessica B 
Wonderful experience! Lee was amazing and took the time to know my problem areas before we got started. Really great for runners or avid gym goers who don’t take enough time on their own to stretch. I generally suffer from a sore lower back and tight legs and walked out feeling like a new person! Highly recommend! 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-PhilipM](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-PhilipM.jpg)
Philip M 
Just visited StretchLab and my experience was AMAZING! Sophie was my Flexologist. Been having lower back issues and she was extremely patient and efficient with stretching me out. She walked me through everything as it was happening and never extended beyond what I could handle. Can't wait to come back! 
- First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-AmyW](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-AmyW.jpg)
Amy W 
Wow- what a great concept. Sunday was my first time at StretchLab and I will be sure to return. Raj was my Flexoligist and provided the just right amount of pressure to feel a good deep stretch ( but not too much). I am confident that the quad and knee stretches were the reason I escaped the slippery Cholla trail on Camelback mountain with no injury. I really recommend StretchLab. 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-SarahH](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-SarahH.jpg)
Sarah H 
I am so grateful to have found StretchLab! I booked a 50 min session with Dominick and it was just what I needed. I have had a hamstring issue for years and tried dry needling, massages, lacrosse balls, foam rolling, creams, etc. The pain was still there. After one session I’m writing this from the treadmill with NO hamstring pain!! Thank you!! 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-JackE](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-JackE.jpg)
Jack E 
I had my first session yesterday with master Flexologist Kelly. She is very knowledgeable and great at what she does! I am a chiropractor and appreciate a hands-on, natural approach to achieving/maintaining optimal health. I will definitely be back and referring patients for services at StretchLab! 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-ChristieS](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-ChristieS.jpg)
Christie S 
Wow! I'm addicted after just 1 visit. Didn't realize how much I would benefit from this technique. Macy did a fantastic job as did Liz for my husband. I would highly recommend this place for any and everybody! 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-HeeshH](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-HeeshH.jpg)
Heesh H 
I tried StretchLab out this weekend and I felt like the service was superb. This might be more helpful than a one hour massage since this actually helps stretch the muscles and helps your body to relax. 
– First Time Visitor 
![FirstTimers-JaimeeO](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/First_Timers/Testimonials/FirstTimers-405x570-JaimeeO.jpg)
Jaimee O 
I just discovered StretchLab. I've been going to Orangetheory Fitness for five months and made huge fitness gains, but have lost a lot of my flexibility and feel tight and sore all the time. The 50 minute assisted stretch really, really helps. I'm excited to see where regular stretching will take me. 
– First Time Visitor
